description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsGreen bag with one main compartment featuring a drawstring closureShimmery fabric near mouth of bagZippered pockets and branding at side Synthetic lining with zippered pocketSlots with fabric insert near front mouth of the bag and handleGathered bottom with oval baseTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 36 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 17 cm
